description: Configuration keywords for MassFlow plot item types created via 'plot item create <type>'. Item types and keyword sets are binary-validated against MassFlow 3D 9.

items.name: drawpoint
items.description: Drawpoints — the extraction points that drive gravity flow.

items.name: mineblock
items.description: Mine-blocks — the tagged orebody cells carrying grade/material state.

items.name: imz
items.description: Isolated Movement Zones (IMZ) — the volumes of material mobilised above a drawpoint.

items.name: marker
items.description: Provenance markers seeded in the rock mass to trace material flow.

items.name: particle-trace
items.description: Particle traces — streamline paths of tracked material.

items.name: history-locations
items.description: History sampling locations — where time-series histories are recorded.

notes: Plot-item keywords are appended after the item type.
Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against MassFlow 3D 9.
MassFlow also accepts the shared/other plot items (geometry, fracture, chart-*, data-*, axes, fos, scalebox); this documents the MassFlow-specific gravity-flow / caving entities.
